log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Githyanki — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Githyanki — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15

ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══

→ Githyanki — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 20] FAIL! 34 necrotic damage. HP: 33/67
--- Githyanki — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
